title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
